Text: Resource Efficiency Adjuster Lisa appears to take longer between activities compared to Adjuster Mike For example in high complexity cases Adjuster Lisa had 3 document requests versus Adjuster Mike 2 and total duration was much longer 77 hours versus 48 hours Adjuster Lisa also handled the medium complexity case which took 26 hours

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Process Bottlenecks The Request Additional Documents loops create significant delays especially when multiple requests are needed Approval and Payment steps also show overnight delays suggesting batch processing or working hour limitations

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Front loading documentation For high complexity claims gather more documents upfront to reduce back and forth Resource training Review Adjuster Lisa performance maybe needs training on first time right documentation review or better customer communication Regional capacity balancing Investigate why Region B is slower maybe workload imbalance or resource constraints SLA for document requests Set time limits for customers to respond and for adjusters to review Parallel processing Where possible initiate approval preparation while waiting for documents Automation Automate document validation to reduce manual review cycles
